zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Astley於1310年出生在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利時，她的父親Sir Giles Astley31歲，母親Alice de Wolvey27歲。她於大約1335年與Sir Richard De Harthill在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年之後在英國瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Astley于1310年出生在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利时，她的父亲Sir Giles Astley31岁，母亲Alice de Wolvey27岁。她于大约1335年与Sir Richard De Harthill在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年之后在英国瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Astley was born in 1310, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Giles Astley, was 31 and her mother, Alice de Wolvey, was 27. She married Sir Richard De Harthill about 1335, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1360, in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Astley est née en 1310, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Giles Astley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice de Wolvey, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard De Harthill environ 1335, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1360, à Polesworth, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Astley 1310 in Astley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Giles Astley 31 und ihre Mutter Alice de Wolvey 27. Sie hat um 1335 in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard De Harthill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1360 in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Astley è nata il nel 1310 nel Astley, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Giles Astley, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alice de Wolvey, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard De Harthill circa 1335, nel Astley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1360, nel Polesworth, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Astleyが1310年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで生まれた時，父Sir Giles Astleyは31歳，母Alice de Wolveyは27歳であった。約1335年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーでSir Richard De Harthillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年以後にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアポレスウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Astley(이)가 1310년 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Giles Astley(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Wolvey(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 Sir Richard De Harthill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 이후 영국 워윅실르 포레스워스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Astley nasceu em 1310, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Giles Astley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Wolvey, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard De Harthill aproximadamente 1335, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1360, em Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Astley родилась в 1310 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Giles Astley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Wolvey, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard De Harthill около 1335 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1360 г. в местности полесворт, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Astley nació en 1310, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Giles Astley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice de Wolvey, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Richard De Harthill aproximadamente 1335, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1360, en Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
